description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the fsharp:netcore Docker image with a global before_script that runs dotnet restore for every job. Define variables project=Source and tests=Tests, and two stages build and test. In the build stage add a build job that sets build_path to $project, changes directory to $build_path, and runs dotnet build. In the test stage add a test job that sets test_path to $tests, changes directory to $test_path, runs dotnet add package coverlet.msbuild and then dotnet test /p:CollectCoverage=true, with no caches, artifacts, or rules.
